'''laduzhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hucklebuck|hucklebuck]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-d-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hucklebuck|hucklebuck]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| laduzhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lædizhith|lædizhith]] || [[word:lædizhij|lædizhij]] || [[word:lædizhish|lædizhish]] || [[word:lædizhi|lædizhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:laduduzhuth|laduduzhuth]] || [[word:laduduzhuj|laduduzhuj]] || [[word:laduduzhush|laduduzhush]] || [[word:laduduzhu|laduduzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:laduzhuth|laduzhuth]] || [[word:laduzhuj|laduzhuj]] || [[word:laduzhush|laduzhush]] || [[word:laduzhu|laduzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ladufzhuth|ladufzhuth]] || [[word:ladufzhuj|ladufzhuj]] || [[word:ladufzhush|ladufzhush]] || [[word:ladufzhuf|ladufzhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:laduzhuthu|laduzhuthu]] || [[word:laduzhuju|laduzhuju]] || [[word:laduzhushu|laduzhushu]] || [[word:laduzhuku|laduzhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:laduzhuth|laduzhuth]] || [[word:laduzhuj|laduzhuj]] || [[word:laduzhush|laduzhush]] || [[word:laduzhu|laduzhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:laduzhuthul|laduzhuthul]] || [[word:laduzhujul|laduzhujul]] || [[word:laduzhushul|laduzhushul]] || [[word:laduzhukul|laduzhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:laduzhuthuthu|laduzhuthuthu]] || [[word:laduzhujuju|laduzhujuju]] || [[word:laduzhushushu|laduzhushushu]] || [[word:laduzhuku|laduzhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:laduzhuthun|laduzhuthun]] || [[word:laduzhujun|laduzhujun]] || [[word:laduzhushun|laduzhushun]] || [[word:laduzhukun|laduzhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:laduzhuthuoro|laduzhuthuoro]] || [[word:laduzhujuoro|laduzhujuoro]] || [[word:laduzhushuoro|laduzhushuoro]] || [[word:laduzhukuoro|laduzhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
